message:
test: update existing test suites for oracle, scheduler, and property tests

Updates to existing test files reflecting API changes and adding new
coverage:

- oracle_regression.rs: refactor meta mutation tests to use updated
  MetaResult/MetaCoverageReport APIs, restructure assertion patterns,
  add coverage for new e-process monitor integration
- oracle_report.rs: update test assertions for expanded oracle report
  format, add validation for new coverage metrics fields
- otel_metrics.rs (+75 lines): add new OTel metrics integration tests
  validating metric export format and histogram boundaries
- property_geodesic_normalization.rs: fix integer cast precision
  (use f64::from with u32 clamping), update test structure
- property_outcome_time.rs: fix clippy lints, add structured logging
  on assertion failures
- property_trace_schema.rs: update for new trace event schema fields
- replay_divergence_diagnostics.rs: adapt to updated divergence report
  API and DivergenceCategory changes
- scheduler_regression.rs: update test helpers for WorkerCoordinator
  and local_ready queue changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
